d7b_reasoning: The strategy constructs a coherent mean reversion narrative: entering when price crosses below the lower Bollinger band (bb_upper_24_2 used as upper reference), z-score below -1.8, RSI under 35, and negative 24h return all signal oversold conditions. The factor set {bb_upper_24_2, close, return_1h, return_24h, rsi_14, zscore_48} is nearly identical to prior entry #43 and structurally very similar to entries #12, #21, #34, and #53, differing only in threshold values or minor factor substitutions.
